options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: end_goal
options.description:
The end goal required to beat the game.

**X-0 - Helping Hands:**
Clear all other bosses (1-X, 2-X, 3-X, 3-DOG, 1-XN, 5-X, 6-X, 7-X, 7-X2) to unlock X-0 - Helping Hands.
Then, clear X-0 to beat the game!

**B Rank All Levels:**
Clear all levels with a B rank or higher to beat the game!

**A Rank All Levels:**
Clear all levels with an A rank or higher to beat the game!

**Perfect All Levels:**
Clear all levels with an S/Perfect rank to beat the game!

options.name: boss_unlock_requirement
options.description:
The requirements to unlock the boss level for an act.

**B Rank:**
The number of levels in their respective act are required to be cleared with a B rank or higher to unlock the act's boss.

**A Rank:**
The number of levels in their respective act are required to be cleared with an A rank or higher to unlock the act's boss.

**Perfect:**
The number of levels in their respective act are required to be cleared with an S/Perfect rank to unlock the act's boss.

options.name: act_1_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description:
The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock '1-X - Battleworn Insomniac'.

This includes '1-BOO - theme of really spooky bird' and '1-CNY - Chinese New Year'.

options.name: act_2_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description:
The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock '2-X - All The Times'.

This includes '2-B1 - Beans Hopper', but **does not** include '2-XN - Bitter Times'.

options.name: act_3_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description: The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock '3-X - One Shift More'.

options.name: act_4_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description: The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock '1-XN - Super Battleworn Insomniac'.

options.name: act_5_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description:
The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock 5-X - Dreams Don't Stop.

This includes '5-3 - Seventh-Inning Stretch', but **does not** include '5-B1 - Rhythm Weightlifter'.

options.name: act_6_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description: The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock '6-X - Boss Fight'.

options.name: act_7_boss_unlock_requirement
options.description:
The number of levels required to be cleared (with the rank set in Boss Unlock Requirement) to unlock the Abandoned Ward and '7-X - Miracle Defibrillator', '7-X2 - Miracle Defibrillator (Cole's Song)'.

This includes '2-XN - Bitter Times'.

options.name: perfect_rank_locations
options.description: Determines if Perfect/S rank locations should be placed in the world.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die (a patient's heart breaks), everyone dies. The reverse is also true.

This can be changed in-game, using the Archipelago page in the pause menu.

options.name: trap_chance
options.description:
Determines the percent likeliness of a **filler item becoming a trap**.
**The sum of Trap Chance and Powerup Chance cannot be over 100%.**

options.name: enable_fragile_heart_traps
options.description: Determines if **increased mistake weight traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_character_scramble_traps
options.description: Determines if **randomized characters traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_beatsound_scramble_traps
options.description: Determines if **randomized beatsound traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_hitsound_scramble_traps
options.description: Determines if **randomized hitsound traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_hard_difficulty_traps
options.description: Determines if **hard difficulty traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_chilli_speed_traps
options.description: Determines if **🌶️ chilli speed traps** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_ghost_tap_traps
options.description: Determines if **ghost tap traps** (make a mistake on ghost tap) should be in the item pool.

options.name: sticky_traps
options.description: Determines the **set of traps that should be applied wherever possible**.

options.name: powerup_chance
options.description:
Determines the percent likeliness of a **filler item becoming a powerup**.
**The sum of Trap Chance and Powerup Chance cannot be over 100%.**

options.name: enable_easy_difficulty_powerups
options.description: Determines if **easy difficulty powerups** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_strong_heart_powerups
options.description: Determines if **decreased mistake weight powerups** should be in the item pool.

options.name: enable_ice_speed_powerups
options.description: Determines if **🧊 ice speed powerups** should be in the item pool.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: 2-1 - Lo-fi Hip-Hop Beats To Treat Patients To
5-2 - Lo-fi Beats For Patients To Chill To

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: 2-1 - Lo-fi Hip-Hop Beats To Treat Patients To
5-2 - Lo-fi Beats For Patients To Chill To

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: 2-1 - Lo-fi Hip-Hop Beats To Treat Patients To
5-2 - Lo-fi Beats For Patients To Chill To

options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: 2-1 - Lo-fi Hip-Hop Beats To Treat Patients To
